request.sql: SELECT id, name, email, status, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE (name ILIKE #{keywordPattern} OR status = #{status} OR status != 'DELETED') ORDER BY created_at DESC

indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_users_name ON public.users USING btree (name)
CREATE INDEX idx_users_status_created ON public.users USING btree (status, created_at DESC)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX users_email_key ON public.users USING btree (email)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX users_pkey ON public.users USING btree (id)

request.templateSql:
<bind name="keywordPattern" value="'%' + keyword + '%'" />
        SELECT <include refid="AdvancedUserColumns" />
        FROM users
        <where>
            <choose>
                <when test="keyword != null and keyword != ''">
                    name ILIKE #{keywordPattern}
                </when>
                <when test="status != null and status != ''">
                    status = #{status}
                </when>
                <otherwise>
                    status != 'DELETED'
                </otherwise>
            </choose>
        </where>
        ORDER BY created_at DESC
